gaps.description: Remote system prompt lacks scope-boundary enforcement, context-awareness, RBAC-awareness, retrieval scope, advisory disclaimers, and permitted_tools contract
gaps.remote_state: Minimal advisory prompt — 5 sentences, no structured constraints
gaps.repo_expectation: runtime-contract.md + guardrails.md + CONTEXT_AND_RBAC_MODEL.md define comprehensive behavior contract
gaps.remediation: Update remote system instructions to match target contract

gaps.description: AI Search service exists but has 0 indexes, 0 documents. No RAG/retrieval is active.
gaps.repo_expectation: runtime-contract.md specifies Azure AI Search index 'ipai-knowledge-index' attached for RAG
gaps.remediation: Create index, populate with knowledge base documents, attach to agent via tool_resources
gaps.automatable: partially — index creation yes, content population requires source docs

gaps.description: Agent has 0 tools wired. Stage 1 read tools not yet connected.
gaps.remediation: Tool wiring is Stage 2 per runtime contract. Document as expected gap for current stage.
gaps.note: Not a blocker for Advisory Release — tools are Stage 2

gaps.description: Zero Foundry-native evaluations. Manual probes exist (4/5 pass) but not sufficient for Advisory Release.
gaps.remote_state: 0 evaluations in Foundry portal, 1 manual probe run
gaps.repo_expectation: publish-policy.md requires passing evaluation evidence. thresholds.yaml defines pass/fail criteria.
gaps.remediation: Run comprehensive evaluation suite (150+ cases for Advisory Release)
gaps.automatable: partially — can run via API but Foundry eval SDK requires project API access (blocked by token audience)

gaps.description: Agent temperature is 1.0 (max creativity). Advisory copilot should use lower temperature for factual/grounded responses.
gaps.repo_expectation: Not explicitly specified in contract but guardrails.md requires grounded responses
gaps.remediation: Set temperature to 0.3-0.5 for advisory mode

gaps.description: Azure Content Safety active at service level but no custom blocklists or guardrail rules
gaps.remediation: Custom guardrails enforced via system prompt + backend, not Foundry-native. Acceptable for Stage 1.

gaps.description: 3 Cognitive Services User role assignments exist but app roles not registered in Entra
gaps.remote_state: 3 service principals with Cognitive Services User role. No app roles registered.
gaps.remediation: Phase 2 of RBAC model. Not blocking for Advisory Release.
gaps.automatable: partially — app role registration via az ad app

gaps.description: No App Insights or tracing configured
gaps.remote_state: AI gateway properties all null, no diagnostic settings visible
gaps.remediation: Stage 2 requirement. Not blocking for Advisory Release.

gaps.description: Public network access enabled, no VNet rules
No context envelope injection. Agent receives raw user prompt without identity, surface, scope, or mode context.
gaps.remote_state: Plain text prompt forwarded to agent
gaps.repo_expectation: CONTEXT_AND_RBAC_MODEL.md defines mandatory server-side context envelope
gaps.remediation: Implement context envelope in foundry_service.py and server.ts. Phase 1 of RBAC model.
